docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER LIANG, AIXUE XIE, XIZHOU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER LIANG, AIXUE XIE, XIZHOU
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (SAN FRANCISCO DAILY JOURNAL) OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF APR-28-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HIS NAME TO STEVEN Y.H. XIE. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER LIANG, AIXUE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
